$comment: capture-correction patterns (v1.8.0 learning loop). Case-insensitive regex sources matched against a rep's own prompt to detect an explicit CORRECTION worth learning (distill THRESHOLDS.user_correction = 1: ONE match drafts a pending instinct behind the human review gate, so precision beats recall — keep this list conservative). Prompts shorter than min_chars or longer than max_chars are skipped (a very long prompt is likely pasted third-party content, which must never become a learned behavior).
